properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v4 v2 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I was an heir without a kingdom I was an orphan with no home These lungs were full of promise But emptiness I chose

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh the power, unending power of Jesus blood That washes white as snow Oh the power, amazing power of redeeming love This grace unshakable

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I’m trading slavery for sonship I’m trading shackles for the keys My inheritance the kingdom Where my father is the King

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You’re the way to life and freedom (oh the power) You’re the truth that can’t be shaken (oh the power) (You are the) rock of my salvation (oh the power) Oh the power of Jesus blood
